assumptions.text: A tag is a free-text string field added to the existing project record; persistence contract CT2 is extended with the new field. No separate Tag table, relation, or controlled vocabulary is introduced.
assumptions.chosen_interpretation: Tag = free-text string field added to the existing project record; extend persistence contract CT2, no new table.
rejected_interpretations: Tag = first-class entity with its own table + many-to-one/many relation to the project; freelancer manages a controlled vocabulary.

assumptions.text: Each project carries exactly one label (singular, as the CR words it). Multiple tags per project are not supported.
assumptions.chosen_interpretation: Each project carries exactly one label (singular, as the CR words it).

assumptions.text: Filtering selects the project list by a single tag at a time. Combining multiple tags with AND/OR semantics is not supported.
assumptions.chosen_interpretation: Filter the project list by a single tag at a time.
rejected_interpretations: Filter by multiple tags combined with AND/OR semantics.

touch_set.note: tag feature is net-new — introduces net-new slice(s); no existing slice's R*/AC* altered.
tag persistence extends the C1 data_store seam via CT2 (label field added on the project record, no new contract); the slice owning CT2 re-enters remaining_sequence for RE-RANK.
